seo.title: Ruben's Auto Repair | Expert Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Ruben's Auto Repair in Dallas, TX offers expert auto repair and maintenance. From brake services to engine diagnostics, we keep you safe on the road. Call (469) 648-9496.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Mechanic Serving Dallas, TX
hero.subheadline: Reliable, honest, and affordable auto repair. We keep your car running smoothly with expert diagnostics and quality parts.

featureSections.title: Quality Auto Repair You Can Count On
featureSections.body: At Ruben's Auto Repair, we treat every car like it's our own. Our certified technicians use state-of-the-art diagnostic equipment to identify issues quickly and accurately. We provide transparent pricing and explain every repair before we start work, so you never feel in the dark.
bullets: Advanced diagnostic tools for accurate repairs
Transparent estimates with no hidden fees
Warranty on parts and labor for your peace of mind
featureSections.cardBody: We believe in building trust with every customer. That's why we offer a 12-month/12,000-mile warranty on all repairs and use only quality parts.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair in Dallas
featureSections.body: From routine oil changes to major engine overhauls, we handle it all. Our shop is fully equipped to service all makes and models. We also offer complimentary multi-point inspections with every service to catch small issues before they become big problems.
bullets: AC, heating, and electrical system repairs
featureSections.cardBody: We know you rely on your vehicle. Our efficient workflow and experienced team mean most repairs are completed the same day, so you're back on the road quickly.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and attends regular training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Transparent Pricing
whyChooseUs.description: We provide detailed estimates upfront and never start work without your approval. No surprises, just honest service.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts & Warranty
whyChooseUs.description: We use OEM and high-quality aftermarket parts, backed by a comprehensive warranty for your peace of mind.

whyChooseUs.title: Customer Satisfaction Focus
whyChooseUs.description: Your safety and satisfaction are our top priorities. We take the time to answer your questions and ensure you're informed.

testimonials.quote: Ruben's Auto Repair is the only shop I trust with my car. They're honest, fair, and always do great work. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: Mike T.

testimonials.quote: I brought my SUV in for a strange noise, and they diagnosed it quickly. The repair was done on time and under budget. Will be back!
testimonials.author: Jessica L.

testimonials.quote: After a bad experience elsewhere, Ruben's restored my faith in auto repair. They explained everything and the price was reasonable.
testimonials.author: Carlos M.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment today and experience the Ruben's Auto Repair difference.

servicesPage.intro: At Ruben's Auto Repair, we offer a full range of auto repair and maintenance services to keep your vehicle running at its best. From routine check-ups to complex repairs, our certified technicians have you covered.

services.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
services.shortDescription: Expert brake service to ensure your safety on the road.
services.longDescription: Your brakes are your vehicle's most critical safety system. At Ruben's Auto Repair, we provide comprehensive brake inspections, repairs, and replacements. Whether you need new pads, rotors, calipers, or a complete brake system overhaul, our technicians use quality parts and precise techniques to restore stopping power and reliability.
benefits: Thorough inspection of all brake components
Use of premium pads and rotors for long life
No squeaks or vibrations – smooth stopping every time
Competitive pricing with warranty on parts and labor

process.title: Inspection
process.description: We check brake pads, rotors, calipers, lines, and fluid levels to identify any issues.

process.title: Repair/Replace
process.description: Worn or damaged components are replaced with high-quality parts, and the system is bled and adjusted.

process.title: Test Drive
process.description: We test the brakes at various speeds to ensure proper function and your safety.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000 to 70,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits and conditions. We inspect them during every service.

faqs.question: What are signs my brakes need service?
faqs.answer: Squealing, grinding, a soft brake pedal, or vibrations when braking are common indicators. Bring your car in for a free inspection if you notice any of these.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Advanced diagnostics to pinpoint and fix engine issues fast.
services.longDescription: When your check engine light comes on or your car isn't performing as it should, our advanced diagnostic tools can quickly identify the root cause. From sensor failures to major mechanical problems, we have the expertise to repair your engine and restore performance. We explain the issue clearly and provide options so you can make an informed decision.
benefits: State-of-the-art diagnostic scanners for accurate codes
Experienced technicians who interpret data correctly
Efficient repairs that save you time and money
Clear communication about what's needed and why

process.title: Scan & Analyze
process.description: We connect diagnostic equipment to read error codes and live data from your engine.

process.title: Inspect & Test
process.description: We perform visual and mechanical tests to confirm the issue and check for related problems.

process.title: Repair & Verify
process.description: We fix the problem, clear codes, and test drive to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: Why is my check engine light on?
faqs.answer: It could be something simple like a loose gas cap, or more serious like an oxygen sensor or catalytic converter issue. We'll diagnose it accurately.

faqs.question: Can you diagnose a car that won't start?
faqs.answer: Yes. We can test the battery, starter, alternator, and fuel system to determine why your car won't start and get you back on the road.

services.title: Oil Change & Preventive Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Regular maintenance to extend the life of your vehicle.
services.longDescription: Routine oil changes and preventive maintenance are the best ways to keep your car running efficiently and avoid costly repairs down the road. At Ruben's Auto Repair, we use quality oil and filters, and we perform a complimentary multi-point inspection with every oil change to catch potential issues early.
benefits: High-quality synthetic and conventional oil options
Complimentary multi-point inspection with every service
Helps improve fuel economy and engine longevity

process.title: Drain & Replace
process.description: We drain old oil, replace the oil filter, and fill with the correct grade of fresh oil.

process.title: Multi-Point Inspection
process.description: We check belts, hoses, fluids, tires, brakes, and lights to identify any maintenance needs.

process.title: Report & Recommendations
process.description: We provide a detailed report of your vehicle's condition and suggest any necessary follow-up services.

faqs.question: How often should I get an oil change?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need an oil change every 5,000 to 7,500 miles, but check your owner's manual. We'll help you set a schedule.

faqs.question: What's included in the multi-point inspection?
faqs.answer: We check fluid levels, belts, hoses, tire condition and pressure, brake pads, lights, and more. It's a thorough health check for your car.

services.title: AC & Heating System Repair
services.shortDescription: Keep your cabin comfortable year-round with expert AC and heating service.
services.longDescription: A functioning climate control system is essential for comfort and safety. Whether your AC blows warm air or your heater isn't working, our technicians can diagnose and repair the issue. We service compressors, condensers, evaporators, and all related components to restore proper operation.
benefits: Complete AC and heating system diagnostics
Freon recharge and leak detection services
Repair or replacement of faulty components
Comfort you can count on in any weather

process.title: System Check
process.description: We test the AC and heater performance, check for leaks, and inspect all components.

process.title: Diagnose Issue
process.description: Using specialized tools, we pinpoint the cause of poor performance, such as low refrigerant or a bad compressor.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We make the necessary repairs, recharge the system if needed, and verify that both heating and cooling work correctly.

faqs.question: Why is my AC blowing warm air?
faqs.answer: Common causes include low refrigerant, a faulty compressor, or a clogged condenser. We'll diagnose the exact problem.

faqs.question: How often should I service my car's AC?
faqs.answer: We recommend an AC check every two years or if you notice reduced cooling performance. Regular service can prevent major failures.

about.headline: Your Trusted Local Auto Repair Shop in Dallas
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair services that keep our customers safe and their vehicles reliable. We believe in transparency, integrity, and exceptional craftsmanship.
story: Ruben's Auto Repair was founded with a simple mission: offer Dallas drivers a better auto repair experience. With over 15 years of hands-on experience, Ruben saw too many shops prioritizing profit over people. He built his own shop on the principles of honesty, quality, and community. Every technician is trained to treat customers like neighbors and cars like their own.

Today, Ruben's Auto Repair serves hundreds of satisfied customers across Dallas. We've earned a reputation for fair pricing, clear communication, and reliable repairs. Whether it's a quick oil change or a complex engine rebuild, we approach every job with the same dedication. We're proud to be a part of the Dallas community and look forward to earning your trust.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We always tell you what your car needs and what it doesn't. No upsells, no surprises.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-tier parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure lasting repairs.

coreValues.title: Transparency
coreValues.description: You'll see a detailed estimate before any work begins, and we welcome your questions.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We support our local Dallas community and treat every customer like a friend.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with Ruben's Auto Repair
contact.subheadline: Ready to schedule service or have a question? Contact us today – we're here to help.
